name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry is a pawn shop in Wilton Manors, FL offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, retail merchandise, and flexible payment options on pre-owned items.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 1000 West Oakland Park Boulevard in Wilton Manors, Florida. The business functions as part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the local community by providing quick cash solutions through collateral-based lending and merchandise sales. The store has been established as a neighborhood pawn shop with consistent operating hours and a commitment to community service.

The company offers a diverse range of services centered on pawn loans, gold and jewelry buying, and retail merchandise sales. Customers can bring items in working condition to receive instant cash loans, with loan amounts determined by item value. They purchase gold, diamonds, and jewelry at what they claim are competitive rates with expert testing of precious metals. The retail side stocks thousands of pre-owned brand-name items including electronics, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, sneakers, and firearms, typically discounted 25-70% below new retail prices. Additional services include layaway (with 10% down payment option), third-party "Take Today" financing up to 12 months, protection plans for jewelry and products, an online shop with daily new arrivals, an instant quote tool for electronics, and an EZ+ Rewards program.

Value Pawn distinguishes itself through multi-channel access to inventory via online shopping and daily merchandise rotation. The EZ+ Rewards program allows customers to manage pawn transactions, layaways, and earn points through an app or online portal with the ability to make online payments on extensions and layaways (unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania). They offer specialized services like a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up values on future purchases. The store explicitly carries firearms and offers auto loans, setting them apart from basic pawn operations.

Value Pawn functions primarily as a collateral lender and used goods retailer rather than a credit-building or alternative lending solution. While they provide quick cash, this comes through pawning items rather than underwriting based on creditworthiness. The business model depends on customers having items of sufficient value to pledge. Their services are straightforward and transparent, though pawn loans carry fees and interest that can be material depending on redemption terms. For consumers without items to pawn or seeking credit-based solutions, this is not an appropriate resource.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Instant cash on items in decent working condition with no credit check required
Expert precious metals testing ensures fair pricing on gold and diamond jewelry purchases
Layaway option with only 10% down payment makes big purchases more affordable
Extensive online inventory with daily new arrivals accessible through their website
EZ+ Rewards program tracks pawns, layaways, and earnings across digital and in-store channels
Flexible financing through third-party "Take Today" partnerships offering up to 12 months payment terms
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up values on future jewelry
cons: Pawn loans subject to unspecified fees and interest that can be substantial depending on terms
Requires items of tangible value to pawn—not accessible to those without collateral to pledge
Online payment options excluded for customers in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
All merchandise is pre-owned; no new items available despite retail-style presentation
Limited credit-building benefit since pawn transactions don't report to credit bureaus
best_for: People needing immediate cash who own items like electronics, jewelry, tools, or instruments
Budget shoppers seeking discounted brand-name merchandise at 25-70% below retail prices
Customers wanting flexible payment options through layaway or third-party financing plans
Individuals with valuable gold or jewelry to sell quickly without waiting for private buyers
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for individuals who own items of value and need immediate cash through collateral-based lending, or budget-conscious shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat is that this is a pawn operation requiring tangible collateral—it provides no credit-building benefit and is not suitable for those seeking credit access, debt relief, or financial counseling.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert precious metals testing
Retail merchandise sales (electronics, tools, gaming, musical gear, handbags, sneakers, firearms)
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party "Take Today" financing up to 12 months (credit/availability dependent)
Jewelry Protection/VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up values
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Online shop with daily inventory updates and instant quote tool for electronics
EZ+ Rewards program with online transaction management and point earnings
Online payment processing for pawn extensions and layaways
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1000 W Oakland Park Blvd, Wilton Manors, FL 33311
